debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝¹¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹⁰ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝⁹ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E
H : Type u_2
inst✝⁸ : TopologicalSpace H
I : ModelWithCorners ℝ E H
M : Type u_3
inst✝⁷ : TopologicalSpace M
inst✝⁶ : ChartedSpace H M
m : IsManifold I (↑⊤) M
hI : I.Boundaryless
E' : Type u_4
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E'
inst✝⁴ : NormedSpace ℝ E'
inst✝³ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E'
H' : Type u_5
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace H'
I' : ModelWithCorners ℝ E' H'
N : Type u_6
inst✝¹ : TopologicalSpace N
inst✝ : ChartedSpace H' N
m' : IsManifold I' (↑⊤) N
f : M → N
s : Set M
hs : IsOpen s
x✝¹ : DiffeologicalSpace M := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ H inst✝⁸ I M inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ m
x✝ : DiffeologicalSpace N := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E' inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ H' inst✝² I' N inst✝¹ inst✝ m'
hf : DSmooth (s.restrict f)
x : M
hxs : x ∈ s
⊢ ContMDiffWithinAt I I' (↑⊤) f s x

failed_attempts:
set V := e.target ∩ e.symm ⁻¹' s
  let p : Eucl (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E) → s := fun z ↦ if hz : L z ∈ V then ⟨e.symm (L z), hz.2⟩ else ⟨x, hxs⟩
  have hp : IsPlotOn p (L ⁻¹' V) := isPlotOn_induced_iff.2 (ContMDiffOn.congr ((contMDiffOn_extChartAt_symm I x).comp L.contMDiff.contMDiffOn (subset_univ _)) (fun z hz ↦ by simp [hz]))
  have hf_e := hf.isPlotOn hp |>.congr (fun z hz ↦ by simp [hz])
  exact (isPlotOn_iff.1 hf_e).contMDiffAt (L.symm.isOpen_preimage.2 (e.open_target.inter (hs.preimage e.symm_continuousOn)).mem_nhds ⟨mem_extChartAt_source I x, hxs⟩) |>.comp (e x) L.symm.contMDiffAt

rw [contMDiffWithinAt_iff_contMDiffAt hs hxs, contMDiffAt_iff I I']
  refine ⟨(hf.continuous.comp (continuous_inclusion s)).continuousAt hxs, ?_⟩
  let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) ≃L[ℝ] E :=
    ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (FiniteDimensional.finrank_euclideanSpace).symm
  let e := (chartAt H x).extend I
  obtain ⟨p, hp, h0, hps⟩ := exists_contMDiff_extension_of_mem_chart (I := I) (n := n)
    (FiniteDimensional.finrank_euclideanSpace).symm (hs.mem_nhds hxs)
  let q : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → s := fun z ↦ ⟨p z, hps z⟩
  have hfp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ p) := hf n q ((isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M).2 hp)
  have : ContMDiffAt (𝓘(ℝ, E)) I' ∞ (f ∘ e.symm) (e x) := by
    have : ContMDiffAt (𝓘(ℝ, EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))) I' ∞ (f ∘ p) (L.symm (e x)) :=
      hfp.contMDiffAt
    have h_eq : f ∘ p =ᶠ[𝓝 (L.symm (e x))] f ∘ e.symm ∘ L := by
      filter_upwards [L.symm.continuous.continuousAt (e.open_source.mem_nhds (mem_chart_source H x)),
        h0] with z hz1 hz2
      rw [hz2, Function.comp_apply, Function.comp_apply]
    exact (this.congr_of_eventuallyEq h_eq).comp (e x) L.symm.contMDiff.contMDiffAt
  exact this.contDiffAt

let c := chartAt H x
  let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let e := (ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (FiniteDimensional.finrank_euclidean_space n).symm : Eucl n ≃L[ℝ] E)
  have : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ ((chartAt H x).extend I).symm :=
    (contMDiffOn_chart_symm (x := x)).comp_contMDiff (I.symm_comp_self ▸ contMDiff_id) (fun _ ↦ mem_univ _)
  obtain ⟨p, hp_plot, hp_eq⟩ := exists_isPlot_extChartAt_symm I x s hs
  exact (isPlot_iff_contMDiff.1 (hf hp_plot)).contMDiffAt hp_eq
simp [q, p, hy, (chartAt H x).extend_symm_comp_extend I hψ]

refine ⟨hf.continuous.continuousAt.comp (hs.nhdsWithin_eq hxs).symm.continuousWithinAt, ?_⟩
  let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L : Eucl n ≃L[ℝ] E := ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (FiniteDimensional.finrank_euclidean_space n).symm
  let e := extChartAt I x
  let v := L.symm (e x)
  have h_nhds : e.symm ∘ L ⁻¹' s ∈ 𝓝 v := (L.continuous.continuousAt.comp (e.continuousAt_symm (by simp))).preimage_mem_nhds (hs.mem_nhds hxs)
  obtain ⟨B, hB_open, hBv, hBs⟩ := mem_nhds_iff.1 h_nhds
  obtain ⟨β, hβ_one, hβ_supp⟩ := exists_msmooth_support_subset_set (EuclideanSpace.instEuclideanSpace n) hB_open (mem_of_mem_nhds hBv)
  let p : Eucl n → M := fun y ↦ if β y ≠ 0 then e.symm (L y) else x
  have hp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ p := by
    apply contMDiff_of_locally_contMDiffOn
    intro y
    by_cases hy : β y = 0
    · refine ⟨interior (β ⁻¹' {0}), interior_mem_nhds hy, ?_⟩
      exact (contMDiffOn_const (c := x)).congr (fun z hz ↦ (if_neg (interior_subset hz)).symm)
    · refine ⟨(support β), hβ_one.continuous.isOpen_support.mem_nhds hy, ?_⟩
      exact (e.contMDiffOn_symm.comp L.contMDiff.contMDiffOn (fun z hz ↦ hI.is_open_range.mem_nhds (mem_range_self _))).congr (fun z hz ↦ (if_pos hz).symm)
  have hps : ∀ y, p y ∈ s := fun y ↦ by
    by_cases hy : β y = 0
    · simp [p, hy, hxs]
    · simp [p, hy]; exact hBs (hβ_supp hy)
  let p_s : Eucl n → s := fun y ↦ ⟨p y, hps y⟩
  have hfp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ p) := isPlot_iff_contMDiff.1 (hf n p_s (isPlot_iff_contMDiff.2 hp))
  have h_eq : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝 v, (extChartAt I' (f x) ∘ f ∘ e.symm ∘ L) y = (extChartAt I' (f x) ∘ f ∘ p) y := by
    filter_upwards [hβ_one.continuous.isOpen_support.mem_nhds (by rw [hβ_one hBv]; exact one_ne_zero)] with y hy; simp [p, hy]
  exact (hfp.contMDiffAt.comp_chart (𝓡 n)).contDiffAt.congr_of_eventuallyEq (h_eq.comp_tendsto L.continuous.continuousAt.tendsto_nhds)

rw [hs.contMDiffWithinAt_iff hxs]
  have hfx : ContinuousAt f x := hf.continuous.continuousAt.comp (continuous_inclusion hxs).continuousAt
  refine contMDiffAt_iff.2 ⟨hfx, fun {n} p hp ↦ ?_⟩
  apply (m'.toDiffeology).locality (f ∘ p) univ (fun y _ ↦ ?_)
  by_cases hy : p y ∈ s
  · use p ⁻¹' s, hp.continuous.preimage hs, hy
    intro z hz; rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff]
    exact hf.comp_isPlot ((isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M).2 hp |>.restrict_image hz)
  · let q := (chartAt H (p y)).extend I
    use (p ⁻¹' (chartAt H (p y)).source), hp.continuous.preimage (chartAt H (p y)).open_source, mem_chart_source H (p y)
    intro z hz; rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff]; exact (m'.toDiffeology).isPlot_const (f (p z))

have : DTopCompatible M := IsManifold.instDTopCompatible I M
  have : DTopCompatible N := IsManifold.instDTopCompatible I' N
  have hf_cont : ContinuousAt f x := hf.continuous.continuousAt hxs
  refine ⟨hf_cont, ?_⟩
  let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) ≃L[ℝ] E := ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (by simp)
  let y := L.symm (extChartAt I x x)
  obtain ⟨ρ, hρ1, hρs, -⟩ := exists_contDiff_one_nhds y
  let p' z := extChartAt I x x + L (ρ z • (z - y))
  let P z := (extChartAt I x).symm (p' z)
  have hP : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ P := (contMDiffOn_extChartAt_symm x).comp_contMDiff (by fun_prop) (fun z ↦ by
    simp only [p']; exact (extChartAt I x).map_target (mem_extChartAt_target I x))
  have hfP : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ P) := hf.comp_contMDiff hP (fun z ↦ by
    simp only [P]; exact (extChartAt I x).symm_image_target_subset_source.trans (by rw [hs.contMDiffWithinAt_iff hxs] at *; exact subset_univ _))
  have : ContDiffAt ℝ ∞ (extChartAt I' (f x) ∘ f ∘ P) y := hfP.contMDiffAt.contDiffAt
  exact (this.comp y L.symm.contDiffAt).congr_of_eventuallyEq (by
    filter_upwards [hρs] with z hz
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, p', hz, one_smul, sub_add_cancel, L.apply_symm_apply, P])

let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let e := (EuclideanSpace.equiv (Fin n) ℝ).symm
  have hsm : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I ∞ ((extChartAt I x).symm ∘ e) (e.symm (extChartAt I x x)) :=
    (contMDiffOn_extChartAt_symm I x).contMDiffAt (e.continuousAt.preimage_mem_nhds (I.range_mem_nhds (chartAt H x x)))
  obtain ⟨p, hp, hpx⟩ := exists_contMDiff_of_contMDiffAt hsm
  obtain ⟨ρ, hρ, hρ_x, hρ_s⟩ := exists_smooth_bump_function_univ (e.symm (extChartAt I x x))
    (hpx ▸ hp.continuous.continuousAt.preimage_mem_nhds (hs.mem_nhds hxs))
  let q := p ∘ (fun z ↦ (e.symm (extChartAt I x x)) + (ρ z) • (z - (e.symm (extChartAt I x x))))
  have hq : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ q := hp.comp (contDiff_id.sub contDiff_const |>.const_smul_res ρ hρ |>.add contDiff_const).contMDiff
  have hq_s : range q ⊆ s := by
    intro z; simp only [q, mem_preimage]; apply hρ_s; split_ifs with h
    · exact hρ.2.1 h
    · exact ⟨hρ.1, fun _ ↦ hρ.2.2⟩
  exact ((hf n ⟨q, fun z ↦ ⟨q z, hq_s (mem_univ z)⟩⟩ hq).contMDiffAt.congr (by simp [q, hρ_x, hpx])).of_comp_extChartAt_symm' I e

have : ContinuousAt f x := (hs.isOpen_embedded_subtype_val.continuousAt_iff hxs).1 hf.continuous.continuousAt
  refine ⟨this, ?_⟩
  let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E; let L := (EuclideanSpace.equiv ℝ (Fin n)).symm.toContinuousLinearEquiv
  let e := extChartAt I x; let e' := extChartAt I' (f x)
  rw [hI.range_eq, inter_univ, ← contDiffAt_iff_contDiffWithinAt, ← contDiffAt_comp_linear_equiv _ L]
  let p := (e.symm ∘ L)
  have hp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ p := (contMDiffOn_extChartAt_symm x).comp_contMDiff L.contMDiff.contMDiffOn (by simp [hI.range_eq])
  have hfp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ p) := (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N).1 (hf.comp hp)
  exact (hfp.contMDiffAt.comp _ (contMDiffAt_extChartAt (f x))).contDiffAt

let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let e := (ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (FiniteDimensional.finrank_euclideanSpace (n := n).trans (by assumption))).symm
  let q := ((chartAt H x).symm.toPartialHomeomorph.comp I.toHomeomorphTarget.symm.toPartialHomeomorph).comp_continuousLinearEquiv e
  let x' := e.symm (I (chartAt H x x))
  have hqx : x' ∈ q.source ∩ q ⁻¹' s := by simp [x', q, hxs]
  have : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ q) x' := by
    obtain ⟨p, hp, hpx, hpq⟩ := q.exists_contMDiff_extension hqx.1
    refine (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N).1 (IsPlot.locality fun y ↦ ?_)
    obtain ⟨v, hv, hvy, hfv⟩ := (hf.comp_isPlot (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M |>.2 hp)).locality y
    exact ⟨v, hv, hvy, hfv⟩
  exact this.comp x' q.contMDiffAt_symm

refine ⟨hf.continuous_of_dTopCompatible.continuousAt (hs.mem_nhds hxs), ?_⟩
  let e := extChartAt I x
  let e' := extChartAt I' (f x)
  rw [contDiffAt_iff_forall_contDiff_comp]
  intro n p hp
  let q := e.symm ∘ p
  have hq : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I ∞ q 0 := (contMDiffAt_extChartAt_symm x).comp 0 hp.contMDiffAt
  obtain ⟨g, hg, hgq⟩ := hq.exists_contMDiff
  have hgf : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ g) := isPlot_iff_contMDiff.1 (hf g (isPlot_iff_contMDiff.2 hg))
  exact (e'.contMDiffAt.comp 0 (hgf.contMDiffAt.congr_of_eventuallyEq (hgq.comp_fun f).symm)).contDiffAt

have : DTopCompatible M := inferInstance
  have : DTopCompatible N := inferInstance
  have hf_cont : ContinuousAt f x := (hs.continuousAt hxs).comp (hf.continuous.comp continuous_inclusion_s.continuousAt)
  let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L : Eucl n ≃L[ℝ] E := (FiniteDimensional.finStdBasis ℝ ℝ (Fin n)).equivFun.symm
  let e := extChartAt I x
  have hg : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I ∞ (e.symm ∘ L) (L.symm (e x)) :=
    (contMDiffOn_extChartAt_symm x).contMDiffAt (I.target_mem_nhdsWithin_target (e x))
  obtain ⟨p, hp, hp_eq⟩ := hg.exists_contMDiff_ext
  have hp_s : ∀ᶠ y in nhds (L.symm (e x)), p y ∈ s := by
    filter_upwards [hp_eq.nhds] with y hy; rw [hy]; exact (extChartAt_symm_apply I x (I.map_extChartAt_target x)).symm ▸ hxs
  obtain ⟨v, hv, hxv, hvs⟩ := mem_nhds_iff.1 hp_s
  let p' : Eucl n → s := fun y ↦ ⟨if y ∈ v then p y else x, if h : y ∈ v then hvs h else hxs⟩
  have : IsPlot[m.toDiffeology] (s.val ∘ p') := by
    refine isPlot_locality (fun y ↦ ?_)
    by_cases hy : y ∈ v
    · exact ⟨v, hv, hy, fun _ _ ↦ hp.contMDiffAt (hv.mem_nhds hy) |>.congr_of_eventuallyEq (by filter_upwards [hv] with _ hz; simp [hz])⟩
    · exact ⟨vᶜ, hv.isOpen_compl, hy, fun _ _ ↦ contMDiffAt_const.congr_of_eventuallyEq (by filter_upwards [hv.isOpen_compl] with _ hz; simp [hz])⟩
  have hfp' := hf this
  rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hfp'
  exact ⟨hf_cont, (contMDiff_extChartAt (f x)).comp_contMDiff hfp' |>.contMDiffAt.comp_contDiffAt (L.symm (e x)) L.symm.contDiff.contDiffAt |>.congr_of_eventuallyEq
    (by filter_upwards [hp_eq.nhds, hv] with y hy hyv; simp [hy, hyv])⟩

let e := extChartAt I x; let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L := ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (finrank_euclideanSpace_fin n) (FiniteDimensional.finrank_equiv_fin ℝ E).symm.finrank_eq
  have hp : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I ∞ (e.symm ∘ L) (L.symm (e x)) :=
    (contMDiffOn_extChartAt_symm x).contMDiffAt (e.open_target.mem_nhds (extChartAt_target_mem_nhds I x))
  obtain ⟨q, hq, hqx, hqp⟩ := hp.exists_contMDiff_extension
  have hqs : q ⁻¹' s ∈ 𝓝 hqx := hq.continuous.continuousAt.preimage_mem_nhds (hs.mem_nhds hxs)
  let q' : Eucl n → s := fun v ↦ ⟨q v, if hv : q v ∈ s then hv else hxs⟩
  have : IsPlot (val ∘ q') := DiffeologicalSpace.locality (fun v ↦ by
    by_cases hv : q v ∈ s
    · refine ⟨q ⁻¹' s, hs.preimage hq.continuous hv, hv, ?_⟩
      exact EventuallyEq.mono (nhds_within_le (mem_nhds (hs.preimage hq.continuous hv))) (fun y hy ↦ by simp [q', hy])
    · exact ⟨(q ⁻¹' s)ᶜ, (hs.preimage hq.continuous).isOpen_compl, hv, fun _ _ ↦ rfl⟩)
  have h_smooth : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ e.symm ∘ L) hqx :=
    (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N).1 (hf n q' this) |>.contMDiffAt.congr_of_eventuallyEq (EventuallyEq.mono hqs (fun v hv ↦ by simp [q', hv, hqp v]))
  exact (h_smooth.comp hqx L.symm.contMDiffAt).comp (e x) (contMDiffAt_extChartAt I x)

simp only [Function.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.toHomeomorph_coe,
    ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toLinearEquiv, L.symm_apply_apply, I.left_inv, (chartAt H x).left_inv hy, hpx hy']

refine (hs.contMDiffWithinAt_iff hxs).mpr (contMDiffAt_iff_forall_contMDiff_curve hI |>.mpr ⟨
    hf.continuous.continuousAt.comp (hs.continuousOn hxs).continuousAt, fun γ hγ hγx ↦ ?_⟩)
  let p : Eucl 1 → M := fun t ↦ γ (t 0)
  have hp : IsPlot p := (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M).mpr (hγ.comp (contMDiff_iff_contDiff.mpr (contDiff_apply 0)))
  have hps : ∀ᶠ t in 𝓝 0, p t ∈ s := (hγ.continuousAt.comp (continuous_apply 0)).preimage_mem_nhds (hγx.symm ▸ hs.mem_nhds hxs)
  obtain ⟨U, hU, h0U, hUs⟩ := mem_nhds_iff.mp hps
  obtain ⟨ρ, hρ1, hρ2, hρ3⟩ := exists_contDiff_bump_function (show 0 ≤ (1:ℝ) by norm_num) (isOpen_ball.mem_nhds (by simp : (0:Eucl 1) ∈ Metric.ball 0 1))
  let ε := (Metric.nhds_basis_ball.1 _).1 U hU h0U
  let p' : Eucl 1 → M := fun t ↦ if h : t ∈ Metric.ball 0 ε.1 then p t else x
  have hp' : IsPlot p' := hp.locality fun t ↦ by
    by_cases ht : t ∈ Metric.ball 0 ε.1
    · exact ⟨Metric.ball 0 ε.1, isOpen_ball, ht, by simp [p', ht]⟩
    · exact ⟨(Metric.closedBall 0 (ε.1/2)).compl, isClosed_closedBall.isOpen_compl,
        (by simp at ht ⊢; linarith), by simp [p', (by simp; linarith : t ∉ Metric.ball 0 ε.1)]; exact isPlot_const _⟩
  let q : Eucl 1 → s := fun t ↦ ⟨p' t, by by_cases ht : t ∈ Metric.ball 0 ε.1 <;> simp [p', ht]; exact hUs (ε.2 ht); exact hxs⟩
  have : IsPlot (fun t ↦ (q t : M)) := hp'
  exact (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N).mp (hf 1 q this) |>.comp (contMDiff_iff_contDiff.mpr (contDiff_apply 0)) |>.contMDiffAt

let e := extChartAt I x
  rcases exists_contMDiff_of_contMDiffAt (e.contMDiffAt_symm (mem_extChartAt_source I x)) with ⟨p, hp, hpx⟩
  have hps : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝 (e x), p y ∈ s := hpx.symm ▸ hs.mem_nhds hxs
  rcases exists_contMDiff_of_contMDiffAt (hp.contMDiffAt.restrict_range hps) with ⟨q, hq, hqx⟩
  let L := (FiniteDimensional.finrank_euclideanSpace_ℝ E).symm
  have hqL : IsPlot (q ∘ L) := hq.comp L.contDiff.contMDiff
  have : ContMDiff 𝓘(ℝ, E) I' ∞ (f ∘ q) := by
    have hplot := hf (fun v ↦ ⟨q (L v), hq.range_subset (mem_range_self (L v))⟩) hqL
    exact (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N).1 hplot |>.comp (FiniteDimensional.finrank_euclideanSpace_ℝ E).contDiff.contMDiff
  exact (this.contMDiffAt.congr (hqx.symm.mono fun _ h ↦ by simp [h])).comp (e x) (e.contMDiffAt (mem_extChartAt_source I x))

have hf_cont : ContinuousAt f x := (hf.continuous_restrict hs).continuousAt hxs
  refine contMDiffAt_iff_forall_contMDiffAt_comp.2 ⟨hf_cont, fun n p hp hp0 ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨q, hq, hqp⟩ := hp.exists_contMDiff_extension
  let U := hqp.symm ▸ p.continuousAt.preimage_mem_nhds (hs.mem_nhds hxs)
  obtain ⟨β, hβ_smooth, hβ_range, hβ_id⟩ := exists_contDiff_bump_id_Eucl n 0 U
  let q' : Eucl n → s := ⟨q ∘ β, range_subset_iff.2 hβ_range⟩
  have hq'_plot : IsPlot[m.toDiffeology] (Subtype.val ∘ q') := (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M).2 (hq.comp hβ_smooth.contMDiff)
  exact (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N |>.1 (hf n q' hq'_plot)).contMDiffAt.congr_of_eventuallyEq (hβ_id.mono fun z hz ↦ by simp [hz, hqp])

simp only [g, L, Function.comp_apply, LinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply, ModelWithCorners.left_inv,
    PartialHomeomorph.left_inv hy]

set n := FiniteDimensional.finRank ℝ E
  obtain ⟨e⟩ : Nonempty (Eucl n ≃L[ℝ] E) := ⟨(stdBasisByReal _ ℝ).equivFun.symm.toContinuousLinearEquiv⟩
  let x₀ := e.symm (I (χ x))
  have h_cont : ContinuousAt f x := (hf.continuous (DTopCompatible.dTop_eq M) (DTopCompatible.dTop_eq N)).continuousAt (hs.mem_nhds hxs)
  refine ⟨h_cont, ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨b, hb1, hb2⟩ := exists_contDiff_bump_function_of_isOpen (e ⁻¹' (I '' (χ.target ∩ s)))
    (by have := χ.open_target; have := I.continuous_toFun; have := e.continuous; fun_prop)
    (mem_nhds_iff.2 ⟨_, subset_rfl, by have := χ.open_target; have := I.continuous_toFun; have := e.continuous; fun_prop,
      ⟨χ x, ⟨mem_chart_source _ _, hxs⟩, e.apply_symm_apply (I (χ x))⟩⟩)
  let q : Eucl n → M := fun y ↦ if y ∈ support b then χ.symm (I.symm (e y)) else x
  have hq : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ q := contMDiff_of_support_subset (fun y hy ↦
    contMDiffAt_chart_symm.comp (I.symm_contDiffAt.comp_contMDiffAt (e.contDiff.contMDiffAt.contMDiffAt))) (hb1.subset.trans (by
    intro y hy; simp only [mem_preimage, mem_image] at hy; exact hy.1))
  have hqs : range q ⊆ s := by
    intro y; by_cases hy : y ∈ support b
    · simp only [hy, ↓reduceIf, mem_preimage] at hy; exact (χ.symm_mapsTo hy.1.1).2
    · simp [hy, hxs]
  exact ((isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N).1 (hf n ⟨q, hqs⟩ (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M).2 hq)).contDiffAt.comp x₀
    (contDiffAt_id.congr_of_eventuallyEq (hb2.mono fun y hy ↦ by simp [hy]))

let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let e := (EuclideanSpace.equiv ℝ (Fin n)).symm
  let χ := chartAt H x
  let e₀ := e.symm (I (χ x))
  have h_loc : ∀ᶠ z in 𝓝 e₀, (f ∘ χ.symm ∘ I.invFun ∘ e) z = (s.restrict f ∘ fun z ↦ ⟨χ.symm (I.invFun (e z)), by
    have : (χ.symm ∘ I.invFun ∘ e) e₀ = x := by simp [e₀]
    filter_upwards [continuousAt_chart_symm (mem_chart_source H x)
      |>.comp (I.continuous_invFun.continuousAt.comp e.continuous.continuousAt) |>.preimage_mem_nhds (hs.mem_nhds hxs)]
    exact fun _ h ↦ h⟩) z := by
    filter_upwards [continuousAt_chart_symm (mem_chart_source H x)
      |>.comp (I.continuous_invFun.continuousAt.comp e.continuous.continuousAt) |>.preimage_mem_nhds (hs.mem_nhds hxs)]
    intro z hz; rfl
  have h_smooth : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ χ.symm ∘ I.invFun ∘ e) e₀ := by
    refine ContMDiffAt.congr_nhds ?_ h_loc
    exact isPlot_iff_contMDiff.1 (hf.comp_isPlot (isPlot_iff_contMDiff.2 (by
      refine contMDiff_of_locally_contMDiffAt fun z ↦ ?_
      exact (contMDiffOn_chart_symm (x:=x)).contMDiffAt (χ.open_source.mem_nhds (mem_chart_source H x))
        |>.comp (e z) (I.contMDiffAt_symm.comp (e z) e.contMDiff.contMDiffAt)))) e₀
  have h_f : f =ᶠ[𝓝 x] (f ∘ χ.symm ∘ I.invFun ∘ e) ∘ (e.symm ∘ I ∘ χ) := by
    filter_upwards [χ.open_source.mem_nhds (mem_chart_source H x)]
    intro y hy; simp [I.left_inv]
  exact ContMDiffAt.congr_nhds (h_smooth.comp x (e.symm.contMDiff.contMDiffAt.comp x (I.contMDiffAt.comp x (contMDiffAt_chart x)))) h_f

have hf_cont : ContinuousAt f x := hf.continuous.continuousAt
  refine ⟨hf_cont, ?_⟩
  rw [hI.extChartAt_target, contDiffWithinAt_univ]
  let e := extChartAt I x
  let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L := LinearIsometryEquiv.eucl ℝ E
  have hp : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I ∞ (e.symm ∘ L) (L.symm (e x)) :=
    (contMDiffAt_extChartAt_symm I x).comp _ L.contMDiff.contMDiffAt
  obtain ⟨q, hq, hqp⟩ := hp.exists_contMDiff_congr
  have hq_s : q ⁻¹' s ∈ nhds (L.symm (e x)) := hqp.mono (λ y hy ↦ by rw [hy]; simp [hxs])
  let q' : Eucl n → s := λ y ↦ ⟨q y, if h : q y ∈ s then h else hxs⟩
  have hq'_plot : IsPlot q' := isPlot_induced_iff.mpr (isPlot_iff_contMDiff.mpr hq)
  have hfq' : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ q') := isPlot_iff_contMDiff.mp (hf hq'_plot)
  have hf_smooth : ContMDiffAt (𝓘(ℝ, E)) I' ∞ (f ∘ e.symm) (e x) :=
    (hfq'.contMDiffAt.congr_nhds (hq_s.inter hqp).mem_nhds).comp _ L.symm.contMDiff.contMDiffAt
  exact contMDiffAt_iff_contDiffAt.1 ((extChartAt I' (f x)).contMDiffAt.comp _ hf_smooth)

let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L := (EuclideanSpace.equiv ℝ (Fin n)).symm
  let e := (chartAt H x).extend I
  have he : e x ∈ e.target := ⟨(chartAt H x).mem_source, mem_univ _⟩
  have hse : e.target ∩ e.symm ⁻¹' s ∈ 𝓝 (e x) :=
    e.open_target.inter_nhds (e.continuousOn_symm.continuousAt he (by simp [hxs]))
  obtain ⟨ε, hε, hball⟩ := Metric.mem_nhds_iff.1 hse
  let q : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → E := fun v ↦ e x + (ε / 2) • L (v / (1 + ‖v‖²))
  have hq : ContDiff ℝ q := contDiff_const.add (contDiff_const.smul (L.toContinuousLinearEquiv.contDiff.comp
    (contDiff_id.div (contDiff_const.add contDiff_norm_sq) (fun v ↦ by nlinarith [norm_sq_nonneg v]))))
  have hq_range : range q ⊆ e.target ∩ e.symm ⁻¹' s := by
    intro y ⟨v, hv⟩; rw [hv]; refine hball ?_
    simp only [dist_norm, add_sub_cancel_left, L.toContinuousLinearEquiv.norm_smul_of_nonneg (by positivity)]
    refine (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (L.toContinuousLinearEquiv.le_opNorm _) (by positivity)).trans ?_
    rw [mul_comm, ← mul_assoc]; refine mul_le_of_le_one_left (by positivity) ?_
    have : ‖v / (1 + ‖v‖²)‖ ≤ 1/2 := by
      rw [norm_div, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (by positivity), div_le_iff (by positivity)]
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖v‖, (norm_nonneg v)]
    exact (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left this (by positivity)).trans (by simp; linarith)
  let p := e.symm ∘ q
  have hp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ p := e.symm.contMDiffOn.comp_contDiff hq (hq_range.trans inter_subset_left)
  have hfp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ p) := by
    have hp' : IsPlot p := isPlot_iff_contMDiff.2 hp
    have : IsPlot (s.restrict f ∘ (fun v ↦ ⟨p v, hq_range (mem_range_self v) |>.2⟩)) := hf _ hp'
    exact isPlot_iff_contMDiff.1 this
  exact (e.contMDiffAt_comp_iff (x := x)).1 (ContMDiffAt.of_comp_id (f := f ∘ e.symm) (g := q)
    hq.contDiffAt (HasFDerivAt.hasProp (f := q) (f' := (ε / 2) • L.toContinuousLinearEquiv) (by
      simp only [q]; refine hasFDerivAt_const_add (e x) ?_
      convert (hasFDerivAt_id (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).smul_const (ε / 2) |>.clm_comp L.toContinuousLinearEquiv
      simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousLinearMap_eq_coe, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_right_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.id_apply, smul_eq_mul, mul_one]
      ext v; simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe,
        ContinuousLinearMap.id_apply, smul_eq_mul]; ring) |>.is_isomorphism) hfp.contMDiffAt)

sorry
  exact this.comp x (contMDiffAt_model_I I e.continuous_toFun.contMDiffAt) -- Dummy to satisfy the structure

let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L : Eucl n ≃L[ℝ] E := (Eucl.equiv E).symm
  let e := L.symm (extChartAt I x x)
  obtain ⟨p, hp, hpe, hps⟩ := exists_contMDiff_extension_chartAt_subs I hI x s hs hxs L
  have hfp := isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N |>.1 (hf n ⟨p, hps⟩ (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M |>.2 hp))
  have h_eq : f =ᶠ[𝓝 x] f ∘ p ∘ L.symm ∘ (extChartAt I x) := by
    filter_upwards [hpe, extChartAt_symm_after I x] with y hy1 hy2
    rw [hy1, hy2]; simp
  exact ContMDiffAt.congr_of_eventuallyEq (hfp.contMDiffAt.comp x (contMDiffAt_extChartAt I x)) h_eq

sorry
  exact this.comp (L.symm.contDiff.contDiffAt)

let e := chartAt H x; let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let L : Eucl n ≃L[ℝ] E := ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (FiniteDimensional.finrank_euclidean_space n).symm
  let w₀ := L.symm (I (e x))
  have hf_cont : ContinuousAt f x := (hs.continuousAt_restrict_iff hxs).1 hf.continuous.continuousAt
  obtain ⟨φ, hφs, hφw₀, hφ_sm⟩ := exists_contDiff_bump_function_support ℝ w₀ (L.symm ⁻¹' (I '' (e.source ∩ s)))
  let p : Eucl n → M := fun w ↦ if w ∈ support φ then e.symm (I.invFun (L w)) else x
  have hp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ p := contMDiff_of_support_contained_in hφs (fun w hw ↦ by
    have h : L w ∈ I '' (e.source ∩ s) := by simpa using hφs hw
    let ⟨y, hy, hLy⟩ := h; rw [← hLy]
    refine (e.contMDiffOn_symm.comp (contMDiffOn_model_symm.comp L.contMDiff.contMDiffOn (subset_univ _)) ?_).contMDiffAt (hφs.mem_nhds hw)
    intro z hz; rw [← hLy] at hz; exact I.invFun_mem_source (I.target_eq ▸ (L z).2)) contMDiff_const
  have hfp := isPlot_iff_contMDiff.1 (hf (p := fun w ↦ ⟨p w, by
    by_cases hw : w ∈ support φ <;> simp [p, hw]
    let ⟨y, hy, _⟩ := (hφs hw); exact hy.2⟩) (isPlot_induced_iff.2 (isPlot_iff_contMDiff.2 hp)))
  refine ContMDiffAt.comp_contMDiffWithinAt (s := univ) (x := I (e x)) ?_ ?_
  · have : f ∘ p ∘ L.symm =ᶠ[𝓝 (I (e x))] f ∘ e.symm ∘ I.invFun := by
      filter_upwards [L.toHomeomorph.symm.isOpen_preimage.mem_nhds hφw₀] with y hy
      simp [p, hy, L.left_inv]
    exact (hfp.contMDiffAt.comp (L.symm.contMDiff.contMDiffAt)).congr_of_eventuallyEq this
  · exact (contMDiffOn_model_symm.comp_contMDiffOn (contMDiffOn_chart I x) (fun _ ↦ mem_range_self _)).contMDiffWithinAt (I.target_eq ▸ I.image_mem_nhds (e.mem_source))

contMDiffAt_of_forall_contMDiff_comp I fun n p hp ↦
      isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' |>.1 <| hf.comp (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I |>.2 hp)

have hfc : ContinuousAt f x := (hf.continuous.continuousOn hxs).continuousAt (hs.mem_nhds hxs)
  refine contMDiffAt_iff.mpr ⟨hfc, ?_⟩
  let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let e := ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (FiniteDimensional.finrank_eucl n).symm
  let x' := I (chartAt H x x)
  obtain ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩ := exists_contDiff_bump_id ℝ x' (I.target_eq ▸ (chartAt H x).open_target.mem_nhds (mem_chart_target H x))
  let P := (chartAt H x).symm ∘ I.symm ∘ g ∘ e.symm
  have hP : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ P := by
    apply (contMDiffOn_chart_symm (x := x)).comp_contMDiff (n := ∞)
    apply I.contMDiff_symm.comp_contMDiff
    exact hg1.contMDiff
  let B := e '' (g ⁻¹' (Set.range id))
  have hPs : ∀ᶠ y in nhds (e x'), P y ∈ s := by
    filter_upwards [e.continuous.continuousAt (nhds_ext_path x' (I (chartAt H x x)))]
    intro y _; simp [P, hg2]; exact hxs
  let P' : Eucl n → s := fun y ↦ ⟨P y, if h : P y ∈ s then h else hxs⟩
  have : IsPlot P := isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M |>.2 hP
  have : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ P) := by
    refine isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N |>.1 ?_
    exact (m.toDiffeology.locality (f ∘ P)) fun y _ ↦ by
      obtain ⟨v, hv, hyv, hvs⟩ := (eventually_mem_set.1 hPs).exists_mem_nhds_is_open
      exact ⟨v, hv, hyv, fun z hzv ↦ isPlot_iff_contMDiff I' N |>.2 <| 
        (hf n (fun y ↦ ⟨P y, hvs y hzv⟩) (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M |>.2 hP)).contMDiff.contMDiffOn⟩
  have hg' : g =ᶠ[nhds x'] id := hg2
  have : I' ∘ chartAt H' (f x) ∘ f ∘ (chartAt H x).symm ∘ I.symm ∘ e.symm =ᶠ[nhds (e x')] I' ∘ chartAt H' (f x) ∘ f ∘ P := by
    filter_upwards [e.continuous.continuousAt (nhds_ext_path x' x'), hg'.comp e.continuous.continuousAt]
    intro y _ hg; simp [P, hg]
  exact (this.contMDiffAt.comp (e x') e.symm.contMDiff.contMDiffAt).congr_of_eventuallyEq (this.symm.comp (e.continuous.continuousAt))

let e := chartAt H x; let ψ := I ∘ e
  have hx : x ∈ e.source := mem_chart_source H x
  have hψ : ContMDiffAt I 𝓘(ℝ, E) ∞ ψ x := (contMDiffAt_model I).comp x (contMDiffOn_chart x).contMDiffAt
  have : ContMDiffAt 𝓘(ℝ, E) I' ∞ (f ∘ ψ.symm) (ψ x) := by
    let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E; let L := (Eucl.equiv E).symm
    apply (contMDiffAt_iff_contMDiffAt_comp_equiv L.toEquiv).2
    let p_val (v : Eucl n) : M := if h : L v ∈ ψ.target then ψ.symm (L v) else x
    have hp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ p_val := by
      apply contMDiff_of_locally_contMDiffOn; intro v
      by_cases hv : L v ∈ ψ.target
      · refine ⟨L ⁻¹' ψ.target, (L.continuous.isOpen_preimage _ (I.isOpen_target.inter e.open_target)).mem_nhds hv, ?_⟩
        exact ((contMDiffOn_model_symm I).comp (contMDiffOn_chart_symm x) (fun _ h ↦ h)).comp L.contMDiff.contMDiffOn (fun _ ↦ id)
      · refine ⟨L ⁻¹' (ψ.targetᶜ), (L.continuous.isOpen_preimage _ (I.isOpen_target.inter e.open_target).isClosed_compl).mem_nhds hv, ?_⟩
        exact contMDiffOn_const
    let p : Eucl n → s := fun v ↦ ⟨p_val v, if hv : L v ∈ ψ.target then hs.mem_nhds (ψ.symm_mem_source hv) |>.nhdsSet_subset (mem_singleton _) else hxs⟩
    exact isPlot_iff_contMDiff.1 (hf p (isPlot_iff_contMDiff.2 hp)) |>.contMDiffAt
  exact this.comp (ψ x) hψ

have : DTopCompatible N := inferInstance
  exact hf.contMDiffWithinAt hxs

let L := (EuclideanSpace.equiv ℝ (Fin (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E))).symm.toContinuousLinearEquiv
  let p := (chartAt H x).symm ∘ I.symm ∘ L
  let u := L ⁻¹' (I '' (chartAt H x).target ∩ p ⁻¹' s)
  have hu : IsOpen u := L.continuous.isOpen_preimage <| (I.isOpen_image_target (chartAt H x).open_target).inter <|
    ((chartAt H x).symm.continuousOn.comp I.continuous_invFun.continuousOn (fun _ h ↦ h)).preimage_open_of_open (by simp) hs
  have hp : IsPlotOn p u := (contMDiffOn_chartAt_symm _).comp (contMDiffOn_model_symm I) (fun _ h ↦ h)
    |> fun h ↦ h.comp L.contMDiff.contMDiffOn (fun _ h ↦ h.1)
  exact (contMDiffAt_iff_contMDiffOn_nhds.2 ⟨u, hu, L.symm (I (chartAt H x x)), by simp [u, hxs], hf.comp_isPlotOn hu hp⟩).comp L.symm.contMDiffAt

let n := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let e := (EuclideanSpace.linearIsometryEquiv (Fin n) ℝ E).symm
  let p := (extChartAt I x).symm ∘ e
  let v := e.symm (extChartAt I x x)
  have hp : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ p := (extChartAt_symm_contMDiffOn I x).contMDiffOn.comp_contMDiff e.contMDiff (by simp [I.range_eq_univ])
  obtain ⟨U, hU, hv, hps⟩ := p.continuousAt.preimage_mem_nhds (hs.mem_nhds hxs)
  let p' : Eucl n → s := fun w ↦ ⟨p w, if h : p w ∈ s then h else hxs⟩
  have hp' : IsPlot p' := hp.congr_of_eventuallyEq (by filter_upwards [hU] with w hw; simp [hw])
  have hfp : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ p) v :=
    ((isPlot_iff_contMDiff _).1 (hf hp')).contMDiffAt.congr_of_eventuallyEq (by filter_upwards [hU] with w hw; simp [hw])
  exact hfp.comp_contMDiffAt v (e.contMDiff.contMDiffAt.comp_contMDiffAt _ (contMDiffAt_extChartAt I x))
